channel.title: tetradentate schiff base; trinuclear copper complex; x-ray study; dft calculation on LMI
channel.description: Recent content in tetradentate schiff base; trinuclear copper complex; x-ray study; dft calculation on LMI

item.title: Design Of End-On Cyanato Bridged Trinuclear Cu(Ii) Schiff Base Complex With Salen Type Schiff Base Ligand: Synthesis, Structural Investigation And Dft Study
